title: Who Can Be The Seele Children
display_title: Who Can Be The Seele Children
wikitext:
[]: Who Can Be The Seele Children?             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sun Oct 23, 2011 12:16 pm Ok so, I am just thinking and thinking..who are the children that are going to have a meeting with Kaworu(also why is he wet?) i also think there will be new charas. Anything in mind people? (talking about eva 3.0 preview) [/b]

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 23, 2011 12:23 pm Rebuild of Evangelion topics belong in the Rebuild of Evangelion forum. They do not belong in Evangelion Chit-Chat.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sun Oct 23, 2011 12:26 pm oh, but isn't there just for news and updates? sorry im new :p

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sun Oct 23, 2011 12:28 pm All Rebuild of Evangelion news, discussion, and chit-chat goes in the Rebuild forum.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Oct 23, 2011 1:08 pm Most likely the other pilots. If not, maybe the multiple Reis seen?

[]: Re: Who Can Be The Seele Children?             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun Oct 23, 2011 2:32 pm Tsuki No Nagisa wrote: i also think there will be new charas.

[]: Re: Who Can Be The Seele Children?             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Oct 23, 2011 3:16 pm Jornophelanthas wrote: Kaworu should have been introduced much earlier than episode 24

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Oct 23, 2011 3:25 pm There were four children in the preview with Kaworu right? Then it's almost definitely Shinji, Rei, Asuka, and Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Azathoth » Sun Oct 23, 2011 3:34 pm The four silhouettes with Kaworu are Reiclones, as confirmed by the storyboards.

[]:             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sun Oct 23, 2011 3:54 pm Azathoth wrote: The four silhouettes with Kaworu are Reiclones, as confirmed by the storyboards.

[]: Re: Who Can Be The Seele Children?             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Sun Oct 23, 2011 7:36 pm Azathoth wrote: Nah. The more time he spends on screen, the more yawnworthy and stock evil bishounen he becomes.

[]:             Quote Post by Stryker » Sun Oct 23, 2011 8:16 pm To backup Gatotsu's statement, just look at Rei. She managed to keep it all up 'till episode 23 (for me, at least).

[]:             Quote Post by Jornophelanthas » Sun Oct 23, 2011 9:26 pm Azathoth wrote: The four silhouettes with Kaworu are Reiclones, as confirmed by the storyboards.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Sun Oct 23, 2011 10:39 pm Azathoth wrote: The four silhouettes with Kaworu are Reiclones, as confirmed by the storyboards.

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Sun Oct 23, 2011 10:48 pm Actually , i dont think they are Rei clones, but who knows , the most appropiated thing is to wait till the movie is out *shrugs* and i DO want more kaworu and Shinji! (me no like Rei) Kaworu clearly wans something with Shinji , even if they dont know who is each other xD (he said he was going to make him happy) (jk) 1 more thing! , : In the moon in eva 2.0 , Wen kaworu says , glad to meet you father, I think that by saying father he is refering to Adam in gendo's palm , (dont know if in this movie he has it) Screw Shinji and Rei! , i want MORE kaworu in this movie anno!!!!

[]:             Quote Post by SaltyJoe » Mon Oct 24, 2011 12:25 pm bobbyfischer's ghost wrote: Rei clones? I thought they were the pilots. can you provide me with a link to the storyboards?

[]:             Quote Post by Tsuki No Nagisa » Mon Oct 24, 2011 8:29 pm SaltyJoe wrote: Here's a link, from gwern's Eva archive. Just to chime in on the whole Kaworu should have had more screentime/buildup thing: i think the suddenness of his appearaence is a big part of what makes him effective. When the hero is struck by a vision on his journey (a common motif), the fact that the vision came out of nowhere makes it all the more powerful. Kaworu plays the role of such a sudden, overwhelming occurrence in Shinji's life, and honestly, i don't really see any other way the character could be utilized. For Q, this means that his screentime will probably be limited, but every second spent with him will be worthvile. Then again, maybe Anno will show me wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Tue Oct 25, 2011 12:35 am SaltyJoe wrote: Here's a link, from gwern's Eva archive.

[]:             Quote Post by symbv » Tue Oct 25, 2011 2:48 am ^ 水面はセル means extra animation cel should be used to depict the water surface (not some CG for example). I am more interested in the storyboard above the Kaworu meeting 4 Rei clones. There is a sex scene between giant Rei and Eva-01 in 2.0 ??? (the storyboard explicitly said it is a SEX scene).

[]:             Quote Post by 1731298478 » Tue Oct 25, 2011 7:23 am symbv wrote: ^ 水面はセル means extra animation cel should be used to depict the water surface (not some CG for example).
